parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messages: ($("Role Prompt Patch").item.json.sessionMessages || []).concat([{ role: "user", content: $("Role Prompt Patch").item.json.userMessage, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }, { role: "assistant", content: $input.item.json.output, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }]), userId: $("Role Prompt Patch").item.json.userId, userRole: $("Role Prompt Patch").item.json.userRole, kbSnapshot: $("Role Prompt Patch").item.json.kbSnapshot, kbFetchedAt: $("Role Prompt Patch").item.json.kbFetchedAt }) }}
